name.description: The displayed name of the category

color.description: Hex or Tailwind CSS colors for highlight background and borders

poem.title: Poem
poem.description: A poetic verse or physical daily snapshot with caption and media

title.description: Title of the poem or caption container

categoryId.description: Category ID the poem matches to

tags.description: A set of tags/keywords for indexing

mood.description: The general mood of the item

attachments.description: Media attachments linked to the poem

isPhotoCapture.description: Whether the entry is a daily snapshot image capture

isPrivate.description: Whether the entry is restricted from public viewing

categories/{categoryId}.description: Available categories in the Poetry platform

poems/{poemId}.description: Catalog of shared and private poetry and snapshots
